text.title: Technical Debt Management Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Debt register with capacity contract + paired prevention policy
example.code: register_id: acme-debt-2026q2 items: - id: d-billing-orm type: code interest_per_month: 12.0 contagion_factor: 1.6 paydown_effort_days: 8.0 prevention_policy: 'ruff rule ban-raw-sql-in-billing + CI gate' impact_score: 2.4 capacity_contract: quarter: 2026-Q2 percent_of_sprint: 18 agreed_by: [pm-alice, tech-lead-bob] visibility: public-to-stakeholders
example.note: Illustrates register-typed + interest-contagion-effort-score + capacity-contract + prevention-policy-paired-with-fix + debt-visibility-public.

example.title: Untyped register with effort-only ranking and soft capacity
example.code: register_id: r1 items: - id: x type: stuff interest_per_month: -1 contagion_factor: -1 paydown_effort_days: 0 prevention_policy: tbd capacity_contract: {quarter: '2026', percent_of_sprint: 50, agreed_by: [pm]} visibility: secret
